goal: Bring Admin Command to 100% pre-launch readiness using cloud-only GPT/GitHub/Vercel/Supabase automation.

phases.name: Deployment Green
tasks: Run fresh Admin Command CI on latest main
Run fresh Vercel deployment from latest main
phases.acceptance: Vercel latest production deployment is READY and core routes respond.

phases.name: Supabase Live Schema
tasks: Confirm Supabase env in Vercel/GitHub Actions
Run supabase db push from cloud workflow
Create a test audit log row
phases.acceptance: Command queue and audit log writes succeed against Supabase.

phases.name: GPT Bridge Operational
tasks: Test approved dry run returns dry-run payload
Test bridge writes audit logs when Supabase is present
Test github.workflow_dispatch dry run and execution after approval
phases.acceptance: Bridge can safely queue/dry-run and execute internal GitHub workflow dispatch.

phases.name: Vercel Automation Operational
phases.acceptance: Admin Command can trigger its own cloud deployment path.

phases.name: GitHub Project Integration
tasks: Create GitHub issues from this backlog
Apply labels: admin-command, phase, prelaunch, automation
Add issues to Strategic-Minds Project 1 if API is available
Document manual project fallback if API is unavailable
phases.acceptance: Every remaining phase is represented as an issue/project item.

phases.name: Apps Script Live Bridge
phases.acceptance: Drive bridge responds and logs quarantine actions.

phases.name: Shopify Publish Bridge
tasks: Test product lookup manually before publish
Publish only after explicit operator approval
phases.acceptance: Shopify publish action is operational and gated.

phases.name: Social Email SMS Relays
tasks: Test each as dry run before live action
phases.acceptance: External posting/sending actions are configured and compliance-gated.

phases.name: UI Controls Wired To Bridge
tasks: Add action forms for bridge actions
phases.acceptance: Operator can control bridge actions from the Admin Command UI.

phases.name: Autonomous Builder Loop
phases.acceptance: Cloud runner can read backlog, validate system, create issues/reports, and propose patches.

phases.name: Production Hardening
phases.acceptance: Production access and data protection controls are in place.

phases.name: Launch Readiness
phases.acceptance: Admin Command is validated as prelaunch ready.
